Source: Bedrock API Reference
URL: https://docs.aws.amazon.com/bedrock/latest/APIReference/welcome.html
Fetched: 2026-03-19

# Amazon Bedrock API Reference

## Service Endpoints
1. bedrock — Control plane APIs for model management, training, deployment
2. bedrock-runtime — Data plane APIs for inference requests
3. bedrock-agent — Control plane APIs for agents, knowledge bases, prompt management, flows
4. bedrock-agent-runtime — Data plane APIs for invoking agents, flows, querying knowledge bases

## Authentication
- AWS SDK cryptographic signing
- IAM-based access control

## SDK Support
C++, Go, Java, JavaScript, Kotlin, .NET, PHP, Python (Boto3), Ruby, Rust, SAP ABAP, Swift

## CLI References
- bedrock, bedrock-runtime, bedrock-agent, bedrock-agent-runtime CLI commands
